chatError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
disclaimer: Polso AI can make mistakes. Always verify important financial data.

connections.cardDescription: Connect your Telegram account to send photos of receipts and invoices directly from your phone. The agent will process them automatically and match them to your transactions.

telegram.title: Telegram
telegram.step2Title: Open Telegram, find @PolsoAgentBot and send it the code
telegram.step2Hint: You can also scan the QR code with your phone camera to open the bot directly.
telegram.howToStep1: Tap the "Generate connection code" button below.
telegram.howToStep2: Open the Telegram app on your phone and find the bot <link>@PolsoAgentBot</link>, or scan the QR code with your phone camera.
telegram.howToStep3: Send the 6-digit code to the bot. Done — your account will be linked and you can start sending receipts via Telegram.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.connectDescription: Soon you'll be able to send receipts via WhatsApp too, without needing to install Telegram.
